Heart Disease MLOps
  • Sklearn Training Module

Sklearn Training Module

Overview

Implements a soft-voting ensemble using scikit-learn models.

Models Used

  • Random Forest

  • Logistic Regression

Responsibilities

  • Train ensemble models

  • Perform cross-validation

  • Save best-performing model

Implementation Details
